name: Creditfy
description_short: Creditfy provides fast business financing solutions including term loans, lines of credit, and equipment financing with approval in hours and funding within 24-48 hours.
description_long:
Creditfy is a business financing platform that specializes in providing rapid access to capital for small and medium-sized businesses across America. The company positions itself as an alternative to traditional bank lending, emphasizing speed and accessibility for entrepreneurs who need funds quickly.

The company offers multiple financing products tailored to different business needs: business term loans, business lines of credit, equipment financing, invoice financing, revenue-based financing, and SBA loans. Creditfy advertises access to funds up to $5 million with approval timeframes measured in hours rather than weeks, and actual funding delivery within 24-48 hours of approval. The application process is designed to be simple, taking less than 5 minutes to complete, with no impact on personal credit scores during the application phase.

Creditfy distinguishes itself through its speed of funding and streamlined application process. The company advertises a 46% approval rate and claims to have helped thousands of businesses access capital. Customer testimonials emphasize quick funding timelines (2-7 days from application to receipt of funds), personalized service from named loan advisors, and willingness to work with businesses that may have been rejected by traditional lenders.

While Creditfy presents attractive speed and accessibility, potential borrowers should note that the monthly rates cited (0.53%) appear to be illustrative minimums rather than guaranteed rates, and actual terms will vary based on creditworthiness and business profile. The 46% approval rate indicates nearly half of applicants are declined. As with alternative business lenders, rates and fees are likely higher than traditional bank loans, though specific APR disclosures are not provided on the website.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Same-day to 48-hour funding timelines after approval, significantly faster than traditional banks
Simple application process taking less than 5 minutes to complete
Multiple financing products available (term loans, lines of credit, equipment, invoice, revenue-based, SBA loans)
Access to loan amounts up to $5 million
Application does not affect personal credit score with no obligation to proceed
Multiple named loan advisors mentioned in customer testimonials providing personalized service
Willing to approve businesses rejected by traditional lenders, as noted in customer feedback
cons: 46% approval rate means majority of applicants are declined
Actual monthly rates and APRs not disclosed; advertised 0.53% rate appears to be unrepresentative minimum
Likely carries higher interest rates and fees than traditional bank business loans due to faster underwriting and greater risk assumption
Limited transparency on specific terms, fees, and rate structures on public website
Customer testimonials are curated selections that do not represent full customer experience range
best_for: Small business owners needing capital quickly for immediate operational or growth needs
Businesses with less-than-perfect credit or those rejected by traditional banks
Companies requiring equipment financing or working capital within days rather than weeks
diagnosis: Creditfy is best for business owners who prioritize speed and accessibility over rate shopping and have been unable to secure traditional bank financing. The main caveat is that faster approval timelines and higher approval rates typically correlate with significantly higher interest rates and fees than conventional business loans; borrowers should compare total cost of capital against traditional lenders before committing.
services: Loan advisor consultation and review of funding options
No credit score impact during application
Business financing consultation and advisory services
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 241 W 37th St Suite 718, New York, NY 10018
